findings.impact: Global runtime start behavior is tied to animation-definition edits instead of trigger-time operator intent.
Operator cannot choose one-shot vs loop-until-stop directly from the dashboard trigger surface.
Per-trigger loop semantics are not wired into the global trigger runtime path.
